data.title: CorroHealth Honored As Stevie® Award Winner In 2026 American Business Awards®
data.description: In Plano, Texas on April 28, 2026, CorroHealth, a prominent revenue cycle technology firm, secured a Silver Stevie® Award in the Health Provider sector at The 24th Annual American Business Awards®. The coveted American Business Awards honor top businesses in the U.S, with CorroHealth's notable achievement showcasing their excellence in this field.

data.title: New Video Enhancer -- MiniTool Released Video Converter 4.7
data.description: MiniTool Software Limited, based in Vancouver, BC, launched MiniTool Video Converter 4.7, introducing the Video Enhancer feature. One of the main features of this new version is the ability to enhance video resolution to 4K by reconstructing pixels. Additionally, the software offers optimization for anime content. This release provides users with an enhanced video conversion experience.

data.title: Zenoti Expands Its AI Workforce: Purpose-Built AI Agents for Every Medspa Workflow
data.description: Zenoti is bolstering the medspa workforce by introducing new AI agents to oversee various operations such as campaigns, consultations, front desk duties, and treatment room management. The AI agents are designed to seamlessly run the entire business without any interruptions between systems. The company is based in Bellevue, Washington, and made this announcement on April 28, 2026. Zenoti is known as the AI-Powered Growth Platform for the beauty industry, reinforcing its commitment to innovation and efficiency.

data.title: This Mother's Day, Give Her Support That Stays--with LiberNovo Omni
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Los Angeles, LiberNovo, an ergonomic innovator, is honoring everyday heroes this Mother's Day by offering meaningful support. Show your appreciation for the mothers in your life by providing them with support that is always there for them when no one else is around.

data.title: NRC Authorizes FPL's St. Lucie Nuclear Plant to Operate for Another 20 Years
data.description: In Jensen Beach, Florida, on April 28, 2026, it was announced that the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) has granted further license renewals for St. Lucie Nuclear Plant Units 1 and 2. The approval allows for the extension of operations up to 2056 and 2063, following a detailed multi-year application and review process.

data.title: Singular Genomics Names John Stark as Chief Executive Officer as Company Builds on Spatial Platform Momentum
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Singular Genomics Systems, Inc. disclosed the selection of John Stark as the new Chief Executive Officer. Following the successful introduction of its top spatial platform, the company is moving into the next phase under his leadership. The appointment marks a significant development for Singular as it progresses in the market with cutting-edge technologies.

data.title: Calidar Completes Enrollment in First-in-Human Study of 4D Mammography System
data.description: A groundbreaking start-up company, Calidar, Inc. based in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, revealed on April 28, 2026, that they have successfully finished enrolling participants for their inaugural human clinical trial of the 4D Mammography system. This study, carried out in partnership with [organization name], marks a significant milestone in advancing precision diagnostic imaging technology.

data.title: Generational Group Advises JumpModel, Inc. in its Sale to Superstep Capital
data.description: Dallas-based Generational Group recently facilitated the sale of JumpModel, Inc. to Superstep Capital on March 24, 2026. JumpModel, Inc., a technology consulting firm based in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada, specializes in assisting asset-intensive enterprises in optimizing complex enterprise systems. This privately held company focuses on expediting IFS implementations.

data.title: Tether partners with Canaan and ACME Swisstech to create customizable Bitcoin mining rigs. #Stablecoin #ModularMining
data.description: Tether, a prominent issuer of stablecoins, has collaborated with Canaan and ACME Swisstech to work on creating customizable and upgradable Bitcoin mining rigs.

data.title: Mesh Expands USDC Settlement to Advance Global Digital Asset Payments
data.description: Mesh, a prominent crypto payments network, has revealed a new partnership with Circle to establish USDC settlement throughout the Mesh ecosystem. This collaboration aims to simplify the process for enterprises, merchants, and Payment Service Providers to transfer value globally. The announcement was made in San Francisco on April 28, 2026.

data.title: CGTN: What China's strong start to the 15th FYP period signals
data.description: CGTN analyzes the factors contributing to the strength and dynamism of the Chinese economy. China remains committed to intensifying reform and opening up, enhancing self-sufficiency in science and technology, securing the independence of industrial chains, and bolstering domestic growth drivers. This commitment has led to significant resilience and vitality in the economy, with key figures showing steady growth in various sectors.

data.title: GIGABYTE Powers Up Amazon Gaming Week with Unbeatable Value and High-Performance Deals
data.description: In the bustling city of Industry, California, on April 28, 2026, GIGABYTE, a renowned player in high-performance computing hardware, is making waves by transforming Amazon Gaming Week into a grand tribute to power and precision. Spanning from April 27 to May 4, GIGABYTE is rolling out exclusive deals as part of this event.

data.title: Bitwise Launches Comprehensive AI Capabilities to Help Enterprises Engineer Their AI Advantage
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Bitwise revealed the introduction of a wide range of AI-focused features in both Chicago and Pune, India. These capabilities are aimed at supporting companies in establishing a lasting competitive edge through the use of AI technology. This initiative, branded as "Engineering Your AI," marks Bitwise's commitment to empowering enterprises with AI-driven solutions.

data.title: Coca-Cola Leads Dow Jones After Earnings Top Views, But This Worries Executives
data.description: Despite surpassing first-quarter expectations, Coca-Cola remains wary of consumer sentiment. The company outperformed in Q1, leading the Dow Jones, but executives express concern about consumer behavior. The post-earnings report shows positive results, with revenue and profit beating projections. However, Coke executives emphasize the need to monitor the mood of consumers closely. This cautious approach comes as the company aims to navigate potential shifts in consumer preferences and market dynamics.
